title: Missing Source struct for Card
description: The Source struct (with label, url, icon, topic fields) is referenced in Card but not defined. Per CDS Hooks spec, Source is REQUIRED on cards with fields: label (required), url (optional), icon (optional), topic (optional Coding).
close_reason: Source struct already exists at card.go:67

title: Implement FHIR AllergyIntolerance projection
description: Create fhir/allergy_intolerance.go with AllergyIntolerance and AllergyReaction types.

title: Implement unit tests
description: Write unit tests for all packages per plan.md Testing Strategy: card_test.go (builder validation), prefetch_test.go (decode Patient, Bundle, missing key), request_test.go (context decoding), server_test.go (discovery, dispatch, 404, panic recovery, CORS), client_test.go (Discover, Call, Feedback with httptest), fhir/patient_test.go (Age calculation), fhir/bundle_test.go (Resources decoding).

title: Implement Card types and fluent builders
description: Create cdshooks/card.go with Card, Source, Suggestion, Action, Link, OverrideReason types and fluent builder with validation (summary ≤140 chars, SelectionBehavior required when Suggestions non-empty, etc.).

title: Missing Extension field on Service
description: Per CDS Hooks spec, discovery responses may include an extension map for custom behavior. Add `Extension map[string]json.RawMessage` field to Service struct with json tag "extension".
close_reason: Extension field already exists on Service at service.go:12

title: Test CORS handling
description: Test CORS preflight (OPTIONS) and actual requests with proper Access-Control-Allow-Origin headers.
close_reason: CORS tests added in server_test.go and integration_test.go

title: Implement Service definition and Builder
description: Create cdshooks/service.go with Service struct, Handler interface, HandlerFunc adapter, ServiceEntry, and ServiceBuilder fluent API for constructing service entries with validation.

title: Service.Title should be optional per spec
description: Per CDS Hooks spec, title is RECOMMENDED (not required). Current ServiceBuilder makes it required. Should be optional but service will work without it.

title: Test card validation
description: Test Card validation: Summary required, summary ≤140 chars, SelectionBehavior required when Suggestions present, detail markdown support.
close_reason: Card validation tests exist in card_test.go

title: Implement FHIR MedicationRequest projection
description: Create fhir/medication_request.go with MedicationRequest struct (ResourceType, ID, Status, Intent, MedicationCodeableConcept, Subject, AuthoredOn).

title: Create example CDS service
description: Create example/service/main.go - runnable example CDS service demonstrating the SDK usage.

title: Implement integration tests for CDS Hooks SDK
description:
## Current Coverage

### Already Implemented (server_test.go)
- Discovery endpoint (GET /cds-services)
- Empty discovery
- Unknown service (404)
- CORS wildcard handling
- HookInstance validation (400)
- Cards never null

### Already Implemented (card_test.go)
- Card validation: summary required, max 140 chars, indicator required
- Source.Label required
- SelectionBehavior required with suggestions
- Card builder success case
- Suggestion builder

### Already Implemented (hook_test.go)
- All hook context types (patient-view, order-select, order-sign, etc.)
- Context JSON decoding

### Already Implemented (prefetch_test.go)
- Prefetch get/decode
- Patient/Bundle decoding
- Missing prefetch detection

## Gaps to Address

1. **Feedback endpoint** - No tests exist for POST /cds-services/{id}/feedback
2. **Error handling** - Need more cases:
   - 400: invalid JSON body
   - 404: service not found  
   - 412: missing required hookInstance field
3. **JSON serialization roundtrips** - Need tests verifying omitempty works correctly
4. **Full lifecycle tests** - End-to-end tests from request through response
5. **CORS variations** - Specific origin matching vs wildcard
6. **Prefetch in request context** - Test integration with CDSRequest

## Implementation Plan

1. Create integration_test.go for full HTTP workflow tests
2. Add feedback endpoint tests
3. Add comprehensive error handling tests
4. Add JSON roundtrip tests
5. Update individual test issues as completed

title: Implement CDS Client for EHR side
description: Create cdshooks/client.go for EHRs to call CDS services: Client with Discover, Call, Feedback methods. Support bearer token, FHIR server auth, timeout options.

title: CDS Hooks Go SDK Implementation
description: Design plan for creating a Go SDK for CDS Hooks 2.0 spec. Packages: cdshooks (main SDK), fhir (thin FHIR R4 projections), example services. Key components: hook constants, typed contexts, Card builders, prefetch decoding, request/response handling, service definition, HTTP server with CORS, EHR client, typed errors, FHIR resource projections.

title: Implement CDSRequest type
description: Create cdshooks/request.go with CDSRequest struct containing Hook, HookInstance, FHIRServer, FHIRAuth, Context, Prefetch fields. Include DecodeContext[T] generic helper.

title: Missing Extension field on CDSRequest
description: Per CDS Hooks spec, requests may include an extension map for custom behavior. Add `Extension map[string]json.RawMessage` field to CDSRequest struct with json tag "extension".
close_reason: Extension field already exists on CDSRequest at request.go:14

title: Implement typed error types in errors.go
description: Create cdshooks/errors.go with typed error types: ErrUnknownService, ErrMissingPrefetch, ErrInvalidContext, ErrInvalidCard, ErrFHIRRequest. All must implement error and errors.Is/errors.As correctly.

title: Move server.go to service subpackage
description: Move cdshooks/server.go to cdshooks/service/server.go. Change package from cdshooks to service. Update imports to reference parent cdshooks package.

title: Implement CDSResponse and Feedback types
description: Create cdshooks/response.go with CDSResponse (Cards, SystemActions), FeedbackRequest, FeedbackOutcome, AcceptedSuggestion types.

title: Test JSON serialization
description: Test JSON serialization/deserialization roundtrips. Verify optional fields are omitted when nil, arrays are empty vs null, pointers serialize correctly.
close_reason: JSON serialization tests added in integration_test.go

title: Implement hook constants and typed contexts
description: Create cdshooks/hook.go with hook name constants (HookPatientView, HookOrderSelect, etc.) and typed context structs for each standard hook (PatientViewContext, OrderSelectContext, etc.) with ParseContext[T] generic helper.

title: Update service imports to use cdshooks parent
description: Update cdshooks/service/server.go to import parent package cdshooks for types, builders, and constants. Ensure all type references work across package boundary.
close_reason: Updated service imports to use cdshooks parent

title: Verify build and tests pass
description: Run go build and go test to verify the refactoring works correctly. All tests should pass with the new package structure.

title: Test feedback endpoint
description: Test feedback endpoint: accepted suggestion feedback, overridden without reason, overridden with overrideReason and userComment.
close_reason: Feedback endpoint tests added in integration_test.go

title: Test error handling (400, 404, 412)
description: Test HTTP error responses: 400 for bad request (missing hookInstance, invalid JSON), 404 for unknown service, 412 when prefetch fails.
close_reason: Error handling tests added in server_test.go and integration_test.go

title: Implement FHIR coding types
description: Create fhir/coding.go with CodeableConcept, Coding, Reference, HumanName types and HasCode, DisplayText helper methods.

title: Test discovery endpoint
description: Test the discovery endpoint (GET /cds-services) returns properly formatted service list, handles empty services, and supports multiple registered services.

title: Create example EHR client
description: Create example/client/main.go - runnable example EHR client demonstrating calling CDS services.

title: Update example imports
description: Update example/service/main.go import from cdshooks to cdshooks/service for the Server.

title: Complete pointer type refactor - fix tests and examples
description: Complete pointer type refactor: fix tests and examples to work with optional *string and *[]Slice types

title: Test prefetch handling
description: Test prefetch handling: decoding prefetch data into FHIR types (Patient, Bundle), handling missing prefetch keys, OperationOutcome error handling.
close_reason: Prefetch tests added in prefetch_test.go and integration_test.go

title: Test service invocation endpoint
description: Test POST /cds-services/{id} invokes handler correctly, passes context/prefetch, returns cards, handles hookInstance validation.
close_reason: Service invocation tests added in integration_test.go

title: Create service package doc.go
description: Create cdshooks/service/doc.go with package documentation explaining it's the chi-based HTTP service built on top of the cdshooks SDK.

title: Implement FHIR Patient projection
description: Create fhir/patient.go with Patient struct (ResourceType, ID, Active, Name, Gender, BirthDate, Deceased) and Age(), DisplayName() helper methods.

title: Update cdshooks/doc.go for SDK focus
description: Update cdshooks/doc.go to clarify it contains the pure SDK (types, builders, client) while cdshooks/service contains the chi HTTP server.

title: Create cdshooks/service directory structure
description: Create cdshooks/service/ subpackage directory with doc.go. This will hold the chi-based HTTP server separate from the SDK.

title: Implement FHIR Bundle type
description: Create fhir/bundle.go with Bundle and BundleEntry types, Resources[T] generic decoder, Count() method.

title: Implement Prefetch decoding helpers
description: Create cdshooks/prefetch.go with Prefetch type wrapping raw JSON map, providing Get, Decode, Patient, Bundle, Missing methods for typed access to prefetch data.

title: OverrideReason struct needed for Feedback
description: OverrideReason struct is needed for Feedback.overrideReason field which has {reason: Coding, userComment: string}. Card.overrideReasons uses []Coding directly. Need to keep OverrideReason struct for Feedback but Card uses []Coding.
close_reason: OverrideReason struct already exists at card.go:74

title: Implement HTTP server with CORS and graceful shutdown
description: Create cdshooks/server.go with HTTP server handling discovery (/cds-services GET), hook invocation (/cds-services/{id} POST), and optional feedback endpoint. Must set CORS headers, validate hookInstance UUID, ensure cards is array not null, implement graceful shutdown, logging with slog, panic recovery.
